abilities.description: Choose target creature or planeswalker. If it was dealt noncombat damage this turn, CARDNAME deals 3 damage to it and you gain 3 life. Otherwise, CARDNAME deals 1 damage to it and you gain 1 life.

effect.description: Choose target creature or planeswalker. If it was dealt noncombat damage this turn, CARDNAME deals 3 damage to it and you gain 3 life. Otherwise, CARDNAME deals 1 damage to it and you gain 1 life.
effect.name: Branch
